artifacts.description: Research report on Succ-chain FMCS and TaskFrame Int construction

partial_progress.details: Analyzed dependencies (Tasks 10-12), reviewed existing infrastructure (FMCS, TaskFrame, WorldHistory, CanonicalTask, SuccExistence), documented implementation approach with split forward/backward chain construction

findings.fmcs_construction: Split forward/backward Nat chains combined into Int-indexed family using Classical.choose
findings.coherence_properties: forward_G/backward_H from Succ g_content/h_content propagation; forward_F/backward_P from bounded_witness theorem
findings.taskframe_instantiation: Use CanonicalTask directly as task_rel; all three axioms already proven in Task 11
findings.respects_task: Chain structure directly gives CanonicalTask relationship for any s <= t
findings.blocking_dependencies: None - Tasks 10, 11, 12 all complete with documented axioms
